hero.description: Please read these terms and conditions carefully before using our service.

acceptanceOfTerms.title: Acceptance of Terms
paragraphs: By accessing and using PixBatch ("Service"), you accept and agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our Service.

These terms apply to all visitors, users, and others who access or use the Service. We reserve the right to update these terms at any time, and your continued use of the Service constitutes acceptance of any changes.

useOfService.title: Use of Service
useOfService.intro: You may use our Service only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these Terms. You agree not to use the Service:
items: In any way that violates any applicable national or international law or regulation
To transmit, or procure the sending of, any advertising or promotional material without our prior written consent
To impersonate or attempt to impersonate the Company, a Company employee, another user, or any other person or entity
To engage in any conduct that restricts or inhibits anyone's use or enjoyment of the Service
To upload or transmit viruses, malware, or any other malicious code
To process images that contain illegal content, violate intellectual property rights, or infringe on privacy rights

userAccounts.title: User Accounts
userAccounts.intro: When you create an account with us, you must provide accurate, complete, and current information at all times. You are responsible for:
items: Maintaining the confidentiality of your account password
All activities that occur under your account
Notifying us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account
Ensuring your password is strong and secure
userAccounts.outro: We reserve the right to disable any user account at any time, without notice, if we believe you have violated these Terms.

intellectualPropertyRights.title: Intellectual Property Rights
paragraphs: The Service and its original content, features, and functionality are and will remain the exclusive property of PixBatch and its licensors.

Your Content: You retain all rights to any images you process using our Service. We do not claim ownership of your images. Since all processing happens in your browser, we never have access to your images.
Our Content: Our trademarks, logos, and service marks displayed on the Service are our property. You may not use these without our prior written permission.

paymentAndBilling.title: Payment and Billing
paymentAndBilling.intro: If you choose to purchase premium features, you agree to provide current, complete, and accurate payment information. You authorize us to charge your payment method for all fees incurred.

items.label: Subscription Plans
items.text: Billed on a recurring basis (monthly or annually) until cancelled

items.label: Refunds
items.text: Generally not provided except as required by law or at our sole discretion

items.label: Price Changes
items.text: We reserve the right to modify pricing with 30 days advance notice

items.label: Cancellation
items.text: You may cancel your subscription at any time through your account settings

items.label: Failed Payments
items.text: If payment fails, we may suspend or terminate your access to premium features

disclaimerOfWarranties.title: Disclaimer of Warranties
disclaimerOfWarranties.intro: The Service is provided on an "AS IS" and "AS AVAILABLE" basis. We make no warranties, expressed or implied, regarding:
items: The accuracy, reliability, or quality of the Service
That the Service will be uninterrupted, timely, or error-free
That any defects will be corrected
That the Service is free from viruses or harmful components
The quality or accuracy of processed images
disclaimerOfWarranties.outro: You use the Service at your own risk. We recommend always keeping backups of your original images.

limitationOfLiability.title: Limitation of Liability
limitationOfLiability.intro: To the maximum extent permitted by law, PixBatch shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including:
items: Loss of profits or revenue
Loss of data or images
Loss of business opportunity
Service interruptions
Any other commercial damages or losses
limitationOfLiability.outro: Our total liability shall not exceed the amount you paid to us in the twelve (12) months preceding the event giving rise to liability, or $100, whichever is greater.

termination.title: Termination
termination.intro: We may terminate or suspend your account and access to the Service immediately, without prior notice or liability, for any reason, including:
items: Violation of these Terms
Fraudulent, abusive, or illegal activity
At your request
Extended periods of inactivity
termination.outro: Upon termination, your right to use the Service will immediately cease. All provisions of these Terms which by their nature should survive termination shall survive.

governingLaw.title: Governing Law
paragraphs: These Terms shall be governed and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of California, United States, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.

Any disputes arising from these Terms or your use of the Service shall be resolved through binding arbitration in San Francisco, California, except that either party may seek injunctive relief in any court of competent jurisdiction.

changesToTerms.title: Changes to Terms
changesToTerms.intro: We reserve the right to modify or replace these Terms at any time at our sole discretion. If a revision is material, we will:
items: Provide at least 30 days notice prior to any new terms taking effect
Notify you via email or a prominent notice on our Service
Update the Last updated date at the top of this page
changesToTerms.outro: By continuing to access or use our Service after revisions become effective, you agree to be bound by the revised terms.

contactUs.title: Contact Us
contactUs.intro: If you have any questions about these Terms and Conditions, please contact us:
